title: RSF Drone Strikes Kosti University Dormitory, White Nile State
detail: An explosive-laden RSF drone struck a university dormitory in Kosti, the capital of White Nile State, injuring seven students, some critically. This marked the beginning of a significant RSF drone campaign in White Nile state, which had previously been largely spared from direct attacks. Multiple RSF drones struck Kosti beginning on March 4, targeting civilian infrastructure including a university dormitory and an electrical transformer at Um Dabakir station.

media.caption: RSF drone strikes target civilian infrastructure in Sudan's escalating air war
